DEPT. 501 JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE; REPORTER ERIC THRONE; CLERK: GARTH SAYERS DEFT DAVIS AGREES TO JUDGMENT; DEFAULT PROVE-UP PUT ON RECORD AS TO DEFT SKINNER; WITNESSES SWORN & EXAMINED; DOC EXHIBITS MARKED, MOVED, AND ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE. COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFT SKINNER. PREMISES TO PLAINTIFF. FORFIET LEASE; WAIVE BACK RENT. STAY EVICTION TILL 4/8/01. IF VACATE BY NOON ON 4/8/01 THEN PLTF WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKINNER, WILLIAM E. DAVIS, LEE A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR STREET # 452, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-08-2001, LEASE FORFEITED
